_comment: Machine-readable manifest for the 10 Westchase quests. Consumed by the generation agents. NEW Meshy chars are budgeted <=12 (11 used); reskins/existing are free. Item icons 20-40. 3D props <=8 (8 used). See QUESTS.md for full design.

overarching_thread.name: The Countryway Pact
overarching_thread.summary: A secret HOA board has run Westchase for two generations by feeding and hiding a crashed entity beneath the lake; every quest reveals one tile, paying off in Q10 beneath the fountain.

new_meshy_roster.name: Vivian Crestwood
new_meshy_roster.look: silver bob, emerald evening gown, pearls; theatrical grande-dame

new_meshy_roster.name: Wendell Pike
new_meshy_roster.look: wiry man, robe over track pants, tinfoil-lined ballcap, binoculars

new_meshy_roster.name: Agatha Holloway
new_meshy_roster.look: stooped elderly caretaker, black shawl, milky eye, holds a lantern

new_meshy_roster.name: Sal Marino
new_meshy_roster.look: old sharp-dressed wiseguy, fedora, cane, pinky ring

new_meshy_roster.name: Desiree the Siren
new_meshy_roster.look: red dress, roadside hazard triangle, sweet smile, hidden blade

new_meshy_roster.name: Brick
new_meshy_roster.look: huge bruiser, tank top, tire iron, neck tattoo

new_meshy_roster.name: The Arcade Warden
new_meshy_roster.look: towering flat-shaded glitch amalgam guardian, single glowing eye, corrupted textures

new_meshy_roster.name: Vlad
new_meshy_roster.look: mountainous oiled bodybuilder, tiny shorts, sweatband, tiny dumbbell

new_meshy_roster.name: The Concierge
new_meshy_roster.look: immaculate charcoal suit, gloves, single Countryway lapel pin, never a hair loose

new_meshy_roster.name: Biscuit
new_meshy_roster.look: small scruffy brown mutt, big ears, wagging tail (non-humanoid animal mesh)

new_meshy_roster.name: Chairman Augustus Thorne
new_meshy_roster.look: tall patrician man, red-and-gold blazer, HOA lapel pin, unnaturally calm

quests.name: A Night to Dismember
quests.discovery: overheard scream at a lit lakeside townhouse at night

npcs.name: Vivian Crestwood
npcs.look: silver bob, emerald gown, pearls; theatrical fearful hostess

npcs.name: Chet the caterer
npcs.look: white service jacket, slick hair, too-calm; unmasks as a Cleaner

npcs.name: Gloria
npcs.look: party guest victim who 'asked about the board'

items.name: Detective's Loupe
items.questUse: REWARD: highlight clues + reveal trapped/false-bottom containers

items.name: Eviction Notice
items.icon: torn letter with a red wax seal

items.name: Scratched Seating Chart
items.icon: smudged diagram with a struck-out name

triggers: timed blackout that kills a guest
liquor-cabinet mousetrap container trap
Chet draws a blade on correct accusation (proximity ambush)

quests.name: Someone's Watching
quests.discovery: approach the pacing man on the townhouse lawn

npcs.name: Wendell Pike
npcs.look: wiry, robe over track pants, tinfoil ballcap, binoculars

npcs.name: Don Sharp
npcs.look: striving dad, first hint he's compromised

npcs.name: The Meter Reader
npcs.look: utility vest, clipboard, dead-eyed; doubles as a Cleaner

items.name: Police Scanner
items.questUse: REWARD: dispatch audio + patrol/spawn minimap marks

items.name: Birdhouse Camera
items.icon: birdhouse with a lens poking out

items.name: Photo of the Lights
items.icon: polaroid of a glow over water

triggers: dusk/night time-of-day gated tails
Don fake-out threat if tailed too close
surveillance van proximity spawn + Cleaner chase at the lake

reward.effect: hear cop dispatch + see patrols/next spawn on minimap while wanted

quests.name: Where the Red House Weeps
quests.discovery: the caretaker sweeping the red-roof house porch at night

npcs.name: Agatha Holloway
npcs.look: stooped, black shawl, milky eye, lantern

npcs.name: The Gray Boy
npcs.look: desaturated glowing child apparition; kid-safe, unharmable

npcs.name: The Historian
npcs.look: consultable for the house's backstory

items.name: Spirit Lantern
items.questUse: REWARD: see in dark, reveal hidden doors, part apparitions

items.name: Association Welcome Packet
items.icon: faded 1980s HOA folder with a seal

triggers: poltergeist ambush if lantern unlit on flooded floor
Cleaner-rigged wall safe (Loupe-flagged container trap)
ambiguous ghost-or-real Cleaner in the board room

reward.effect: dark-vision, reveal hidden/sealed doors, stun/part apparitions

quests.name: The Countryway Job
quests.discovery: talk to the old planner at Starbucks (requires owning a gun)

npcs.name: Sal Marino
npcs.look: old sharp-dressed wiseguy, fedora, cane, ring

npcs.name: Marcus
npcs.look: indebted inside man

npcs.name: Duke the wheelman
npcs.look: jumpsuit, aviators, gum; optional getaway driver

items.name: Lockpick Set
items.icon: leather roll of picks + tension wrench

items.name: Association Ledger
items.icon: black accounts book with the seal

triggers: Marcus fake-out silent alarm if pressed wrong
vault timer trips a 2-Cleaner proximity spawn guarding the board box
false-bottom dumpster container trap

reward.effect: silently open locked doors/containers/ATMs/lot cars; no ATM auto-stars; skip jimmy timer

quests.name: Roadside Assistance

npcs.name: Desiree the Siren
npcs.look: red dress, hazard triangle, sweet smile, hidden blade

npcs.name: Brick
npcs.look: huge, tank top, tire iron, neck tattoo

npcs.name: Rescued Husband
npcs.look: grateful, rattled Good Samaritan

items.name: Bait Car Keys + Slim Jim
items.icon: slim-jim crossed with a heart-charm keyfob
items.questUse: REWARD: unique fast car + instant hotwire

items.name: Marks Corkboard Note
items.icon: pinned index card 'flagged for the board'

triggers: Brick + goons proximity-spawn from treeline/trunk (ambush)
Desiree fake-out victim act then draws
secret_poi: The Manhole Room (gang stash) -> q10 access shaft

reward.effect: keep tuned muscle car + instant hotwire (skip break-in timer)

quests.name: Insert Coin to Continue
quests.discovery: talk to Xander at the arcade cabinets

npcs.name: Xander
npcs.look: laid-back gamer, Derik's friend

npcs.name: Derik Sharp
npcs.look: trapped teen; optional 'asleep' reskin state

npcs.name: The Arcade Warden
npcs.look: towering flat-shaded glitch amalgam, single glowing eye, lake-entity voice

items.name: WESTCHASE Cartridge
items.icon: unlabeled game cartridge (crumbles to lake sand)

props: arcade cabinet portal + glitch-world environment kit (prop #5)
triggers: touching a frozen NPC aggros a corrupted enemy (touch trap)
repeating-aisle loop until correct order
Arcade Warden phase boss (lake-entity voice)
connections: direct line to the lake entity -> q10

quests.name: Leg Day
quests.discovery: the squatting fitness prophet at the lakeside picnic spot

npcs.name: Vlad
npcs.look: mountainous oiled bodybuilder, tiny shorts, sweatband, tiny dumbbell

npcs.name: Chad
npcs.look: tank top, visor, permanent smoothie

npcs.name: Vlad's Gnome
npcs.look: the 'boulder' you carry (not a character)

items.name: Tunnel Map Fragment
items.icon: torn blueprint scrap of a tunnel

triggers: Chad comic slow chase (fake-out)
gnome-carry slow timed waddle
two real Cleaners stashing crates in the Gains Cave (ambush)
secret_poi: The Gains Cave (cellar behind a building) -> q10 tunnel node
connections: Gains Cave tunnel <-> manhole(q5) <-> storm drain(q9) <-> q10

quests.name: The Cleaners
quests.discovery: triggered by reaching 3+ stars then escaping clean (or a kill threshold): a black card appears

npcs.name: The Concierge
npcs.look: immaculate charcoal suit, gloves, Countryway lapel pin

npcs.name: Silas
npcs.look: grey hoodie, hollow eyes, gloves; tired handler

npcs.name: The Target
npcs.look: a previously-helped NPC named in the final contract

items.name: Ghost
items.questUse: REWARD capability: stealth kills don't raise wanted + dealer discount

triggers: rigged rival envelope container trap in the oak
clean stealth kill = no stars (mechanic intro)
refuse contract 3 -> Concierge sends Cleaners after you (ambush)
secret_poi: Hollow Oak (tree hole dead-drop) + q10 clue

reward.effect: silenced weapon; stealth kills don't raise wanted; dealer fence discount

connections: Q8 fork sets q10 ending (inherit vs expose/burn)

quests.name: Where's Biscuit?
quests.discovery: the crying youngest Sharp at the Publix lot

npcs.name: Dylan Sharp
npcs.look: tearful kid; untouchable

npcs.name: Hide-and-Seek Champion
npcs.look: proud map-savvy child; untouchable

npcs.name: Biscuit
npcs.look: small scruffy brown mutt, big ears, wagging tail (non-humanoid)

items.name: Dog Whistle
items.icon: brass dog whistle on a red collar-tag

triggers: harmless raccoon jump-scare from the drain (non-hostile)
secret_poi: The Storm Drain (invented) -> q10 wade-in approach
champion soft-teaches Hollow Oak/Roof Stash/Gains Cave

reward.effect: summon Biscuit: fetch cash/items, sniff buried cash + secret POIs, non-lethal enemy harass

connections: Sharp-family core (Dylan/Don <-> Derik q6 <-> Don q2)

quests.name: What Lies Beneath
quests.giver: The Concierge or Don Sharp (per Q8 fork)
quests.discovery: triggered when holding Etched Lake Key(q4)+Tunnel Fragment(q7)+Alien Keycard(q9) and having met the Concierge(q8)

npcs.name: Chairman Augustus Thorne
npcs.look: tall patrician, red-and-gold blazer, HOA pin, unnaturally calm

npcs.name: The Entity
npcs.look: the crashed thing in its tank/craft

npcs.name: Don Sharp (redeemed)
npcs.look: defecting ally at the climax

items.name: The Board Signet
items.icon: gold signet ring with Countryway seal
items.questUse: REWARD (Inherit ending): run Westchase town-wide perk

items.name: The Whistleblower
items.questUse: REWARD (Expose ending): cop leniency + hero prices

items.name: Scorched Earth RPG
items.questUse: REWARD (Burn ending): unique weapon + wilder sandbox

triggers: board Cleaners last stand (ambush)
the entity wakes (Arcade Warden voice returns)
THE CHOICE fork: expose/burn/inherit
secret_poi: The Sub-Lake Facility (finale) + convergence of all prior POIs; red-house lift alt entrance

reward.effect: ending-dependent: Board Signet (run the town) / Whistleblower (leniency+hero prices) / Scorched Earth (RPG skin + chaos)

connections: pays off every quest key/NPC/thread; Q8 fork gates ending set; reuses UFO/alien asset
